title: Booking a Hotel
content: Before his vacation, Ethan spent several evenings searching for the right hotel online. He compared prices, locations, and customer reviews carefully. Some hotels were too expensive, while others were too far from the city center. Eventually, he found a comfortable hotel near the main attractions and booked a room for five nights. After receiving the confirmation email, Ethan felt relieved because one important part of the trip was complete. He printed the reservation details and added them to his travel folder. Planning the vacation became more exciting once the hotel was reserved.
